title: Phone Wallpaper Customizer
description: A web application that allows users to create and customize their own phone wallpapers. Users can choose from a variety of templates, colors, patterns, and images to design their unique wallpapers. The application also provides tools for adding text, shapes, and other design elements. Once the design is complete, users can download their custom wallpaper in the appropriate resolution for their phone.
tech: Local Storage or IndexedDB for saving designs
